reference: Muscle weakness and knee stiffness are obviously due to immobility. As you start movement after a long time, it will take time to loosen up the joint. Similarly, muscles will take time to regain their strength along with knee movement. Muscles are responsible for stabilizing your knee, so as your muscles start to gain strength, the problems and discomfort related to equilibrium will be resolved. Patience and physiotherapy will be helpful.
text: Muscle weakness and knee stiffness are obviously due to immobility. As you start movement after a long time, it will take time to loosen up the joint. Similarly, muscles will take time to regain their strength. Along with knee movement, muscles are responsible for stabilizing your knee. So, as your muscles start to gain strength, the problems and discomfort related to equilibrium will be resolved. Patience and physiotherapy will be helpful.
